title: Copper Golem Hats
description: Have you ever wanted a little copper buddy on your head?
body:
# Copper Golem Hats

Have you ever wanted to put your copper buddy on your head?
Now you can — in style.

## About

Copper Golem Hats is a whimsical Minecraft datapack that lets you wear your favorite copper golem statue as a hat. Whether your golem is standing, walking, sitting, or striking a star pose, this pack turns them into pixel-perfect headgear.

## How It Works

Just hold any copper golem statue in your hand and run:


```
/trigger hatificator
```

The statue transforms into a wearable item that sits proudly atop your head, showing off your oxidized companion to the world.

## Features

• Four unique poses: Standing, Walking, Sitting, and Star
• Simple trigger command — no setup required
• Works in survival and creative
• Perfect for roleplay, screenshots, or just vibing with your copper pal


## Requirements

• Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.9+
• Datapack installation (drop into your world’s `datapacks` folder)

## Showcase

Your golem, your style. Whether you’re building a steampunk city or just chilling in a copper cave, these hats add a touch of charm and personality to any look.
